channel.title: TOEFL | Steve Ying-Chu Chen's CV website

item.title: 2025 TOEFL ITP 高等教育學術研究獎學金 (2025 TOEFL ITP Higher Education Academic Research Scholarship)
item.description:
Congratulations to Ying-Chu Chen for receiving the 2025 TOEFL ITP Higher Education Academic Research Scholarship! This distinction serves as a testament to her dedication and outstanding results in the field of academic research.

The scholarship committee recognized Ying-Chu’s commitment to research excellence, inviting her to join other distinguished recipients at the award ceremony.

Ceremony Details:

  • Date: December 20, 2025 (Saturday)
  • Time: 13:30 – 15:10
  • Location: Taipei 101 SPACE 88 (88th Floor, No. 7, Section 5, Xinyi Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City)

The event was held at the prestigious Taipei 101 SPACE 88, marking a significant milestone in her academic journey. This scholarship not only highlights her current achievements but also encourages further contributions to the academic community.
